example_1_en: This slide summarizes the responses to consultant questions.
example_1_zh: 這張簡報彙整了對顧問問題的回覆。
example_2_en: Each consultant question should be answered with clear supporting information.
example_2_zh: 每個顧問問題都應以清楚的佐證資訊回覆。

example_1_en: Please refer to the attached file for our responses to your questions.
example_1_zh: 請參考附件中我們對您問題的回覆。
example_2_en: The response should be concise but technically complete.
example_2_zh: 回覆應簡潔但技術內容完整。

example_1_en: Please refer to the briefing document for more details.
example_1_zh: 更多細節請參考簡報文件。
example_2_en: The briefing document summarizes the current grounding concept.
example_2_zh: 該簡報文件彙整了目前的接地概念。

example_1_en: The attached file includes our responses and supporting explanations.
example_1_zh: 附件包含我們的回覆與補充說明。
example_2_en: A supporting explanation is provided for the proposed bonding method.
example_2_zh: 針對建議的搭接方法已提供補充說明。

example_1_en: Please refer to the attached briefing document for more details.
example_1_zh: 更多細節請參考附件簡報文件。
example_2_en: For more details, please see the grounding layout on the next slide.
example_2_zh: 更多細節請見下一頁的接地配置圖。

example_1_en: The bonding resistance shall be checked at each interface.
example_1_zh: 每個介面的搭接電阻都應被檢查。
example_2_en: The interface between the panel and the ring is critical for EMC.
example_2_zh: 面板與航電環之間的介面對 EMC 很關鍵。

example_1_en: The structural department has preliminarily agreed to this approach.
example_1_zh: 結構部門已初步同意此作法。
example_2_en: The acceptance values were preliminarily defined for discussion.
example_2_zh: 驗收值是為了討論而初步定義的。

example_1_en: The copper foil and busbars will be installed internally.
example_1_zh: 銅箔與銅排將安裝在內部。
example_2_en: This change should be reviewed internally before sending it to the consultant.
example_2_zh: 此變更在送給顧問前應先進行內部審查。

example_1_en: The values shown in this table are preliminary assumptions.
example_1_zh: 此表中的數值為初步假設。
example_2_en: This grounding layout is based on a preliminary assumption.
example_2_zh: 此接地配置是基於初步假設。

example_1_en: The following are engineering design assumptions.
example_1_zh: 以下是工程設計假設。
example_2_en: Engineering design assumptions should be clearly separated from final requirements.
example_2_zh: 工程設計假設應與最終需求清楚區分。

example_1_en: The assumed values shall be confirmed in the final requirements.
example_1_zh: 假設值應在最終需求中確認。
example_2_en: The final requirement will be defined after consultant review.
example_2_zh: 最終需求將在顧問審查後定義。

chinese_meaning: 待最終確認；需最終確認
example_1_en: The values are preliminary assumptions and subject to final confirmation.
example_1_zh: 這些數值為初步假設，仍待最終確認。
example_2_en: The bonding method is subject to final confirmation by the structural team.
example_2_zh: 搭接方法仍需由結構團隊做最終確認。

example_1_en: Copper busbars will be installed on top of the copper foil.
example_1_zh: 銅排將安裝在銅箔上方。
example_2_en: The bonding washer is placed on top of the conductive surface.
example_2_zh: 搭接墊片放置在導電表面上方。

example_1_en: Copper busbars will be installed on top of the copper foil.
example_1_zh: 銅排將安裝在銅箔上方。
example_2_en: The subsystem chassis is bonded to the copper busbar.
example_2_zh: 子系統機殼與銅排進行搭接。

example_1_en: Copper braided straps will be used to interconnect the panels and the avionics ring.
example_1_zh: 銅編織帶將用於互連面板與航電環。
example_2_en: A short copper braided strap reduces bonding inductance.
example_2_zh: 短的銅編織帶可以降低搭接電感。

example_1_en: We have identified aerospace-grade materials for the outer surface.
example_1_zh: 我們已找到可用於外表面的航太等級材料。
example_2_en: Aerospace-grade coatings are usually qualified for harsh environments.
example_2_zh: 航太等級塗層通常會通過嚴苛環境的驗證。

example_1_en: The material has ESD protection properties.
example_1_zh: 該材料具有 ESD 保護特性。
example_2_en: Electrical conductivity is an important material property.
example_2_zh: 導電性是一項重要的材料特性。

example_1_en: Each subsystem will be bonded to the local copper busbar.
example_1_zh: 每個子系統都會搭接到局部銅排。
example_2_en: The avionics ring contains multiple power, RF, and control subsystems.
example_2_zh: 航電環包含多個電源、射頻與控制子系統。

example_1_en: The copper busbars interconnect the composite panels and the avionics ring.
example_1_zh: 銅排將複合材料面板與航電環互相連接。
example_2_en: All bonding points should be interconnected with low impedance paths.
example_2_zh: 所有搭接點應以低阻抗路徑互連。

example_1_en: EMC problems often appear during system integration.
example_1_zh: EMC 問題經常在系統整合階段出現。
example_2_en: The grounding condition changes after system integration on a non-conductive ring.
example_2_zh: 系統整合到不導電環上後，接地條件會改變。

example_1_en: MIL-STD-464 defines requirements for Electromagnetic Environmental Effects at the system level.
example_1_zh: MIL-STD-464 定義系統層級電磁環境效應的要求。
example_2_en: Lightning, ESD, RF exposure, and intra-system EMC are part of Electromagnetic Environmental Effects.
example_2_zh: 雷擊、ESD、RF 暴露與系統內 EMC 都屬於電磁環境效應的一部分。

example_1_en: System-level EMC can fail even if each electronic box passes MIL-STD-461.
example_1_zh: 即使每個電子盒都通過 MIL-STD-461，系統層級 EMC 仍可能失敗。
example_2_en: The consultant should review the system-level EMC risk after installation on the avionics ring.
example_2_zh: 顧問應審查航電環安裝後的系統層級 EMC 風險。

example_1_en: The E3 Control Plan should include bonding resistance and shield continuity checks.
example_1_zh: E3 控制計畫應包含搭接電阻與屏蔽連續性檢查。
example_2_en: Worst-case operation should be captured in the E3 Control Plan.
example_2_zh: 最壞情境操作應納入 E3 控制計畫。

example_1_en: The avionics ring must operate safely in the mission electromagnetic environment.
example_1_zh: 航電環必須能在任務電磁環境中安全運作。
example_2_en: RF transmitters, ground support equipment, and lightning effects all shape the mission electromagnetic environment.
example_2_zh: RF 發射器、地面支援設備與雷擊效應都會形成任務電磁環境。

chinese_meaning: 系統內 EMC；系統內部相容性
example_1_en: Intra-system EMC checks whether one onboard subsystem interferes with another.
example_1_zh: 系統內 EMC 檢查一個機載子系統是否會干擾另一個子系統。
example_2_en: JetVane operation is a key intra-system EMC case for DAQ monitoring.
example_2_zh: JetVane 動作是 DAQ 監測的重要系統內 EMC 情境。

example_1_en: External RF EME should be tailored to the launch and test environment.
example_1_zh: 外部 RF 電磁環境應依發射與測試環境裁剪。
example_2_en: The RF receiver must remain functional under the specified external RF EME.
example_2_zh: RF 接收器必須在指定外部 RF 電磁環境下維持功能。

example_1_en: The impedance requirement should be confirmed before final design release.
example_1_zh: 阻抗要求應在最終設計發行前確認。
example_2_en: Each bonding interface may have a different impedance requirement.
example_2_zh: 每個搭接介面可能有不同的阻抗要求。

example_1_en: The acceptance values in the table are preliminary assumptions.
example_1_zh: 表格中的驗收值為初步假設。
example_2_en: Each acceptance value should be confirmed by test requirements.
example_2_zh: 每個驗收值都應由測試需求確認。

example_1_en: The control plan links design rules to inspection and test evidence.
example_1_zh: 控制計畫將設計規則連結到檢查與測試證據。
example_2_en: Bonding checks should be listed in the control plan.
example_2_zh: 搭接檢查應列入控制計畫。

example_1_en: Each bonding measurement should be stored as an acceptance record.
example_1_zh: 每項搭接量測都應保存為驗收紀錄。
example_2_en: The consultant may ask for the acceptance record before EMC testing.
example_2_zh: 顧問可能會在 EMC 測試前要求查看驗收紀錄。

example_1_en: A verification record should show the measured value and the acceptance limit.
example_1_zh: 驗證紀錄應顯示量測值與允收限制。
example_2_en: The verification record supports the final MIL-STD-464 compliance review.
example_2_zh: 驗證紀錄支援最終 MIL-STD-464 符合性審查。

example_1_en: A source-victim matrix helps identify which subsystem may disturb another subsystem.
example_1_zh: 干擾源－受害者矩陣可幫助識別哪個子系統可能干擾另一個子系統。
example_2_en: The source-victim matrix should include JetVane, EPDS, RF modules, DAQ, and flight computers.
example_2_zh: 干擾源－受害者矩陣應包含 JetVane、EPDS、RF 模組、DAQ 與飛控電腦。

example_1_en: The DAQ module is a likely victim of actuator switching noise.
example_1_zh: DAQ 模組很可能是致動器切換雜訊的受害者。
example_2_en: A victim should be monitored during each worst-case EMC test.
example_2_zh: 每個最壞情境 EMC 測試都應監測受害設備。

example_1_en: A long cable shield can become a coupling path for RF noise.
example_1_zh: 長距離線纜屏蔽層可能變成 RF 雜訊的耦合路徑。
example_2_en: The review should identify every major coupling path between noisy and sensitive subsystems.
example_2_zh: 審查應識別強干擾與敏感子系統之間的主要耦合路徑。

example_1_en: A floating enclosure may develop a different potential from nearby equipment.
example_1_zh: 浮接機殼可能與附近設備形成不同電位。
example_2_en: Floating enclosures can make the EMC result sensitive to cable placement.
example_2_zh: 浮接機殼會讓 EMC 結果容易受到線束擺放影響。

example_1_en: A floating shield may act like a long antenna instead of a shield.
example_1_zh: 浮接屏蔽層可能像長天線，而不是屏蔽。
example_2_en: The design must prevent the cable shield from becoming a floating shield.
example_2_zh: 設計必須避免線纜屏蔽層變成浮接屏蔽層。

example_1_en: Parasitic capacitance can couple actuator noise into a nearby sensor line.
example_1_zh: 寄生電容可能將致動器雜訊耦合到附近感測器線路。
example_2_en: A conductive reference surface helps control parasitic capacitance paths.
example_2_zh: 導電參考面有助於控制寄生電容路徑。

example_1_en: Common-mode current on a cable can increase radiated emissions.
example_1_zh: 線纜上的共模電流可能增加輻射發射。
example_2_en: Shield termination and filtering are used to control common-mode current.
example_2_zh: 屏蔽終端與濾波可用來控制共模電流。

example_1_en: High di/dt loads such as JetVane drivers require careful routing and filtering.
example_1_zh: JetVane 驅動器等高 di/dt 負載需要謹慎走線與濾波。
example_2_en: The high di/dt current loop should be kept as small as possible.
example_2_zh: 高 di/dt 電流迴路應盡可能縮小。

example_1_en: High dv/dt switching can capacitively couple noise into sensor wiring.
example_1_zh: 高 dv/dt 切換可能透過電容性耦合把雜訊導入感測器配線。
example_2_en: A shielded enclosure can reduce the effect of high dv/dt switching nodes.
example_2_zh: 屏蔽外殼可降低高 dv/dt 切換節點的影響。

example_1_en: Surge protection is required at interfaces exposed to external transients.
example_1_zh: 暴露於外部瞬態的介面需要突波保護。
example_2_en: TVS devices are commonly used for surge protection on power and signal lines.
example_2_zh: TVS 元件常用於電源與訊號線的突波保護。

example_1_en: A load step on the 48 V bus can disturb sensitive electronics.
example_1_zh: 48 V 匯流排上的負載階躍可能干擾敏感電子設備。
example_2_en: The EPDS transient test should include several load step conditions.
example_2_zh: EPDS 瞬態測試應包含多種負載階躍條件。

example_1_en: Precipitation static can accumulate on non-conductive surfaces.
example_1_zh: 降水靜電可能累積在不導電表面上。
example_2_en: The avionics ring needs a controlled discharge path for precipitation static.
example_2_zh: 航電環需要為降水靜電提供可控洩放路徑。

example_1_en: Lightning indirect effects can induce transient currents in long cables.
example_1_zh: 雷擊間接效應可能在長線纜中感應瞬態電流。
example_2_en: The bonding network should provide a bypass path for lightning indirect effects.
example_2_zh: 搭接網路應為雷擊間接效應提供旁路。

example_1_en: A cable-induced transient may enter the avionics box through an external interface.
example_1_zh: 線纜感應瞬態可能透過外部介面進入航電盒。
example_2_en: Surge protection should be placed near the entry point to limit cable-induced transients.
example_2_zh: 突波保護應靠近進入點，以限制線纜感應瞬態。

example_1_en: The faying interface must be clean before the resistance measurement.
example_1_zh: 進行電阻量測前，貼合介面必須清潔。
example_2_en: Paint or adhesive contamination at the faying interface can increase resistance.
example_2_zh: 貼合介面的漆或膠污染可能增加電阻。

chinese_meaning: 多點縫合式連接；密集搭接點
example_1_en: More stitching points reduce the high-frequency impedance of the panel edge.
example_1_zh: 更多 stitching 點可降低板邊高頻阻抗。
example_2_en: RF-sensitive areas should use a shorter stitching interval.
example_2_zh: RF 敏感區應使用較短的 stitching 間距。

example_1_en: The edge frame improves continuity around the composite panel.
example_1_zh: 邊框可改善複材板周圍的連續性。
example_2_en: A 360-degree edge frame is preferred for shield termination.
example_2_zh: 屏蔽終端優先採用 360 度邊框。

chinese_meaning: 中央集線座；中央搭接匯集點
example_1_en: The central hub provides a low-impedance connection between the three panels.
example_1_zh: 中央 hub 提供三片板之間的低阻抗連接。
example_2_en: Sensitive electronics should not be mounted directly on the central hub.
example_2_zh: 敏感電子設備不應直接安裝在中央 hub 上。

example_1_en: The reference ring provides a continuous path around the avionics ring.
example_1_zh: 參考環在航電環周圍提供連續路徑。
example_2_en: Each panel should connect to the reference ring at multiple points.
example_2_zh: 每片板都應以多點連接到參考環。

example_1_en: Worst-case simultaneous operation should include RF transmit and actuator motion.
example_1_zh: 最壞情境同時操作應包含 RF 發射與致動器動作。
example_2_en: The system must not lose critical data during worst-case simultaneous operation.
example_2_zh: 系統在最壞情境同時操作時不得遺失關鍵資料。

example_1_en: The all-on worst case verifies whether all noisy subsystems can operate together.
example_1_zh: 全部開啟最壞情境用來驗證所有高雜訊子系統是否能同時運作。
example_2_en: All-on worst case testing is useful before formal qualification.
example_2_zh: 全部開啟最壞情境測試適合在正式鑑定前執行。

example_1_en: Quiet mode establishes the baseline noise level of DAQ and navigation.
example_1_zh: Quiet mode 用來建立 DAQ 與導航的基線雜訊。
example_2_en: The quiet mode result is compared with actuator and RF operating modes.
example_2_zh: Quiet mode 結果會與致動器與 RF 操作模式比較。

example_1_en: RF transmit mode should use the maximum expected transmit power.
example_1_zh: RF 發射模式應使用預期最大發射功率。
example_2_en: DAQ drift and receiver desense are monitored during RF transmit mode.
example_2_zh: RF 發射模式期間需監測 DAQ 漂移與接收器 desense。

example_1_en: The actuator worst case includes maximum JetVane motion and fast valve switching.
example_1_zh: 致動器最壞情境包含 JetVane 最大動作與閥門快速切換。
example_2_en: Power transients should be recorded during the actuator worst case.
example_2_zh: 致動器最壞情境期間應記錄電源瞬態。

example_1_en: Each operation mode should have a defined EMC observation item.
example_1_zh: 每個操作模式都應有定義好的 EMC 觀察項目。
example_2_en: Quiet mode and RF transmit mode are two important operation modes.
example_2_zh: Quiet mode 與 RF transmit mode 是兩個重要操作模式。

example_1_en: No latched fault should occur after an ESD event.
example_1_zh: ESD 事件後不得產生鎖存故障。
example_2_en: The event log should record any latched fault during the pre-scan.
example_2_zh: 事件紀錄應記錄預掃描期間的任何鎖存故障。

example_1_en: The acceptance criteria should define allowable functional degradation.
example_1_zh: 驗收標準應定義允許的功能劣化程度。
example_2_en: Mission-critical functions should have no functional degradation during EMC testing.
example_2_zh: 任務關鍵功能在 EMC 測試期間不應有功能劣化。

example_1_en: The DAQ noise floor is measured before turning on the actuator.
example_1_zh: 啟動致動器前需量測 DAQ 的雜訊底限。
example_2_en: An increased noise floor may indicate coupling from a noisy subsystem.
example_2_zh: 雜訊底限升高可能代表受到高雜訊子系統耦合。

example_1_en: Packet loss must be monitored during RF and actuator tests.
example_1_zh: RF 與致動器測試期間必須監測封包遺失。
example_2_en: A sudden increase in packet loss may indicate EMC susceptibility.
example_2_zh: 封包遺失突然增加可能表示 EMC 易受擾。

chinese_meaning: 系統發射圖譜；系統發射地圖
example_1_en: A system emission map helps locate dominant radiated emission sources.
example_1_zh: 系統發射圖譜有助於定位主要輻射發射源。
example_2_en: The emission map should be updated after harness routing changes.
example_2_zh: 線束路徑變更後應更新發射圖譜。

example_1_en: The induced level on a cable may increase when the RF transmitter is active.
example_1_zh: RF 發射器啟動時，線纜上的感應位準可能增加。
example_2_en: The induced level must stay below the equipment tolerance threshold.
example_2_zh: 感應位準必須低於設備容許門檻。

chinese_meaning: 接收靈敏度降低；去敏感化
example_1_en: The S-band transmitter may cause desense in a nearby UHF receiver.
example_1_zh: S-band 發射器可能造成附近 UHF 接收器靈敏度降低。
example_2_en: Receiver desense should be checked during maximum RF transmit power.
example_2_zh: 在最大 RF 發射功率時應檢查接收器 desense。

chinese_meaning: 接收器去敏感化；接收器靈敏度下降
example_1_en: Receiver desense can occur when onboard noise enters the antenna path.
example_1_zh: 當機上雜訊進入天線路徑時，可能發生接收器靈敏度下降。
example_2_en: The RF test should monitor receiver desense and packet loss at the same time.
example_2_zh: RF 測試應同時監測接收器 desense 與封包遺失。

chinese_meaning: 天線配重地；對應地平面
example_1_en: An antenna mounted on a composite surface may need a counterpoise.
example_1_zh: 安裝在複材表面的天線可能需要 counterpoise。
example_2_en: Without a counterpoise, RF current may return through power or communication cables.
example_2_zh: 若沒有 counterpoise，RF 電流可能經由電源或通訊線回流。

example_1_en: Antenna port induced level should be checked during RF compatibility testing.
example_1_zh: RF 相容性測試時應檢查天線埠感應位準。
example_2_en: The receiver may be damaged if the antenna port induced level is too high.
example_2_zh: 若天線埠感應位準過高，接收器可能受損。

chinese_meaning: RF 發射禁止；發射抑制
example_1_en: RF transmit inhibit may be required during sensitive ground operations.
example_1_zh: 敏感地面操作期間可能需要 RF 發射禁止。
example_2_en: The test procedure should verify the RF transmit inhibit function.
example_2_zh: 測試程序應驗證 RF 發射禁止功能。

example_1_en: Power level control can reduce RF risk during integration testing.
example_1_zh: 功率等級控制可降低整合測試期間的 RF 風險。
example_2_en: The RF module should support power level control if desense is observed.
example_2_zh: 若觀察到 desense，RF 模組應支援功率等級控制。

example_1_en: Flight control and navigation are mission-critical functions.
example_1_zh: 飛控與導航是任務關鍵功能。
example_2_en: Mission-critical data should be monitored during all EMC test scenarios.
example_2_zh: 所有 EMC 測試情境都應監測任務關鍵資料。

example_1_en: A safety-critical command must not be triggered by RF interference.
example_1_zh: 安全關鍵指令不得被 RF 干擾誤觸發。
example_2_en: Safety-critical functions require clear pass-fail criteria.
example_2_zh: 安全關鍵功能需要明確的通過/失敗判準。
